## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## To reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Config / command used (please redact secrets) ...
2. Request / harness pointed at the router ...
3. See error ...

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened (include the decision-log entry or traceback if you have one).

## Environment

- anvil-serving version: <!-- e.g. 0.3.0 -->
- Python version: <!-- e.g. 3.11 -->
- OS: <!-- e.g. Windows 11 / Ubuntu 24.04 -->
- Harness: <!-- e.g. Claude Code, Aider, Codex, OpenClaw -->

## Additional context

Anything else that would help — config snippet (secrets redacted), logs, etc.
